zh.lifeSummary: 當Ellen Betley Egerton於1422年出生在英國斯塔福爾萊內爾時，她的父親Ralph Egerton of Wrinchill24歲，母親Elizabeth Mainwaring28歲。她於1439年與John Delves結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1504年4月20日在英國格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利享年82歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾維布波瑞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ellen Betley Egerton于1422年出生在英国斯塔福爾萊內爾时，她的父亲Ralph Egerton of Wrinchill24岁，母亲Elizabeth Mainwaring28岁。她于1439年与John Delves结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1504年4月20日在英国格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利享年82岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾維布波瑞。

nameMeanings.name: Egerton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cheshire and Lancashire): variant of   Edgerton  .

variants.name: Edgerton
meanings: English (West Midlands): habitational name from any of various places called Egerton in Cheshire and Kent, Egerton in Wheathill (Shropshire), Egerton in Bolton le Moors (Lancashire), Egerton in Scammonden (Yorkshire), or Edgerton in Huddersfield (Yorkshire). Egerton in Kent is from the Old English personal name Ecgheard + Old English tūn ‘estate, farmstead’ (see Eckert ), but Egerton in Chesire is more likely to derive from the Old English personal name Ecghere (in which the second element is Old English here ‘army’) + Old English tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Ellen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Helen , although now no longer associated with that name. Initial H- tended to be added and dropped rather capriciously, leading to many doublets ( compare for example Esther and Hester ). It is also sometimes used as a short form of Eleanor , to which, however, it is unrelated.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

nameMeanings.name: Betley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which originated as a local name from any of the dozen or so places in England so called from Old English beonet ‘bent grass’ + lēah ‘wood, clearing’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Ellen Betley Egerton was born in 1422, in Wrinehill, Staffordshire, England, her father, Ralph Egerton of Wrinchill, was 24 and her mother, Elizabeth Mainwaring, was 28. She married John Delves in 1439. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 20 April 1504, in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 82, and was buried in Wybunbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ellen Betley Egerton est née en 1422, à Wrinehill, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph Egerton of Wrinchill, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Mainwaring, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé John Delves en 1439. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 avril 1504, à Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterrée à Wybunbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ellen Betley Egerton 1422 in Wrinehill, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ralph Egerton of Wrinchill 24 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Mainwaring 28. Sie hat 1439 John Delves geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. April 1504 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Wybunbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ellen Betley Egerton è nata il nel 1422 nel Wrinehill, Staffordshire, England, sua padre, Ralph Egerton of Wrinchill, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Mainwaring, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato John Delves nel 1439. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 20 aprile 1504, nel Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 82 anni, e fu sepolta a Wybunbury, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ellen Betley Egertonが1422年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアウリンエヒルで生まれた時，父Ralph Egerton of Wrinchillは24歳，母Elizabeth Mainwaringは28歳であった。1439年にJohn Delvesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1504年4月20日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアテウケスブリーで82歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアウイブンブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ellen Betley Egerton(이)가 1422년 영국 스태퍼드실르 라이인힐에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph Egerton of Wrinchill(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Mainwaring(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1439년 John Delves(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1504년 4월 20일 영국 그루스스터실르 튜케스버이에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 윈이버버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ellen Betley Egerton nasceu em 1422, em Wrinehill, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph Egerton of Wrinchill, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Mainwaring, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com John Delves em 1439. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de abril de 1504, em Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 82 anos, e foi sepultada em Wybunbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ellen Betley Egerton родилась в 1422 г. в местности раинэилл, стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Ralph Egerton of Wrinchill было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Mainwaring, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Delves в 1439 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 20 апреля 1504 г. в местности тюкесбури, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 82 лет и была похоронена в местности вибунбури, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ellen Betley Egerton nació en 1422, en Wrinehill, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph Egerton of Wrinchill, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Mainwaring, tenía 28 años. Se casó con John Delves en 1439. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 20 de abril de 1504, en Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 82 años, y fue sepultada en Wybunbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
